description: Complex test queries for Cricket World Cup RAG Assistant reinforcement learning

queries.question: Tell me the complete performance of MS Dhoni across all World Cups from 2003 to 2023
How did Virat Kohli perform in each World Cup edition? Give tournament-by-tournament stats
Compare Ricky Ponting and Sachin Tendulkar's World Cup careers with runs in each edition
What are Kumar Sangakkara's batting stats across all World Cups he played in?
Who are the best death overs bowlers in World Cup history from 2003 to 2023?
What are the death overs batting and bowling statistics across World Cup tournaments?
Which bowlers have the best economy rate in the powerplay overs in World Cup history?
Has any team scored over 400 in a World Cup match? List all 400+ team scores
What is the fastest century in World Cup history and who scored it?
What is the highest individual score ever in a World Cup match?
List the top 5 highest team totals in World Cup history 2003-2023
Compare Eoin Morgan and Kane Williamson as World Cup captains with detailed stats
Which captain has the best win percentage in World Cup history from 2003 to 2023?
What were the most memorable moments of the 2015 World Cup?
What were the key highlights and memorable events of the 2007 World Cup?
Describe the most dramatic moments from the 2023 World Cup
How did the 2019 World Cup final end? Explain the Super Over and boundary count rule
What was the overthrow controversy in the 2019 World Cup final?
What are the average scores at major World Cup venues? Which ground has the highest average first innings score?
What is India's win-loss record across all World Cups from 2003 to 2023?
Which team has the worst win-loss ratio in World Cups from 2003 to 2023 with minimum 20 matches?
What is Australia's World Cup record? How many titles have they won from 2003-2023?
Who won the Player of the Tournament award in each World Cup from 2003 to 2023?
Who were the top run scorers (Golden Bat winners) in each World Cup edition?
What is India vs Pakistan head to head record in World Cups from 2003 to 2023?
What were the biggest upsets in World Cup history from 2003 to 2023?
Tell me about Bob Woolmer's death during the 2007 World Cup
Compare Glenn Maxwell's 201* vs Afghanistan in 2023 with other great World Cup knocks
How many centuries did Rohit Sharma score in the 2019 World Cup? Is that a record?
Describe the 2011 World Cup final. How did Dhoni finish the match?
